channel.title: Chad Fink's Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Chad Fink's Blog

item.description:
Q1
  1. ~~Urchin (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 10m. Not interested in watching junky bum on streets of london story.
  2. If I Had Legs Id Kick You (2025) ★★☆☆ > Great perf from Byrne. end at 30m. Lost interest
  3. Train Dreams (2025) ★★★☆ > Beautiful film. Slow/Boring like drinking a cup of tea.
  4. Christy (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 30m. Didn’t like the story. Chars are annoying
  5. No Other Choice (2025) ★★★☆ > Good, but overrated. Originalish story. Not serious enough for my taste. Char behaviors don’t make sense.
  6. Die My Love (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 30m. No interest in chars or story
  7. Blue Moon (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 25m. 20m of Ethan Hawke talking; it’s good, but I lost interest. It’s not going anywhere
  8. Bugonia (2025) ★★★☆ > Very weird. good perfs. original. Forced ending twist. good dialogue
  9. I Swear (2025) ★★★☆ > Really funny. Well done film that educates and creates empathy. This was very close to 4 strs, but I dont think I have much interest in watching again. definitely the best of Q1 so far.
  10. Left-Handed Girl (2025) ★★★☆ > Taiwanese. Incredibly touching story of working class Taiwanese family life. close to 4 stars
  11. Sisu Road To Revenge (2025) ★★☆☆ > Absurd B movie action flick. I’ve seen the first one so I expect more of the same. end at 20m
  12. It Was Just An Accident (2025) ★★★☆ > Iranian. Very good. Loved the last 10 mins. Decent insight into suffering under the current regime
  13. Sentimental Value (2025) ★★★★ > Outstanding. Lead actress phenomenal. Deep chars. Subtle. Beautiful.
  14. Sore Wife From The Future (2025) ★★☆☆ > Writing and dialogue not very good. Story is implausible. Behaviors are not believable. end at 20m
  15. The Last Viking (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 10m. Kind of interesting but the dialogue translation is not very good. Maybe done by a cheap AI model
  16. Sound of Falling (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 1.5 hrs. Really weird. Kind of interesting but not enough to keep me watching. Overrated.
  17. Wake Up Dead Man A Knives Out Mystery (2025) ★★★☆ > Very good fun movie mystery. Glenn Close was dynamite. Story all made sense in the end, bravo.
  18. The Secret Agent (2025) ★★★☆ > Brazilian. Very long. Hard to follow. High quality perfs, interactions, chars. Subs were translated badly (confirmed). Would like to watch again with better translation.
  19. The Rip (2026) ★★☆☆ > Pretty bad. Couldn’t even watch with food. Story is too dumb. Chars are braindead.
  20. The Godfather (1972) ★★★★ > Incredible story, chars, interactions, dialogue, perfs. About as close to perfection as you can get. Captures emotions with subtlety. Unfolding story perfectly paced building tension at the right moments.
  21. The Godfather 2 (1974) ★★★★ > Great. Not as good as the first one, but still phenomenal.
  22. The Things You Kill (2025) ★★☆☆ > Turkish. end at 20m. Nothing to keep me interested. Just don’t care.
  23. Donnie Darko (2001) ★★★★ > Still awesome. So weird so fun. The perfect cult classic. Unique story, masterfully unfolded. Weird chars, great interactions.
  24. Rental Family (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 1 hr. Nothing to say. Bored. Mediocre
  25. The Housemaid (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 50. Story is flat. Monotonous dialogue, weak perfs, chars.
  26. Ran (1985) ★★★☆ > Japanese. The translation is so bad it ruins the film. I am surprised I finished this. I can imagine that even with a good translation I would still find this highly overrated.
  27. Burning (2018) ★★★★ > Korea. Very good. Really enjoyed it. I would watch again. The main chars obsession makes for boring sequences. And Bens acquiescence doesn’t really make sense if he was self-made, but maybe it does if his wealth was inherited.
  28. Memories of Murder (2003) ★★★☆ > Korean. Good. Funny. Loved the ending. I liked “Burning” more.
  29. Gladiator (2000) > Rewatch. end at 10m. Cheesy dialogue. Cheesy slow mo. Lower angel programming. I see why I loved it as a youngster, but it doesn’t speak to me anymore.
  30. The Queen (2006) > end at 10m. Decent enough but I have no interest in the Queens story. I’ve see the HBO show and that was more than enough.
  31. The Dutchman (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 25m. Taking to long to get somewhere. The dialogue is not strong enough nor the pers to hold attenti
  32. Redux Redux (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 30m. Interesting premise, but weak chars, coherence, story, pers.
  33. The Plague (2025) ★★★☆ > Very good. strong perfs, chars, unique story. Intimate look at the brutality at young teenage male life
  34. Hamnet (2025) ★★★☆ > Ending made me feel emotion and I don’t know why. The film never really grabbed me
  35. Snowpiercer (2013) > Rewatch. Very good. Cult classic vibes
  36. 28 Years Later (2025) ★★★☆ > Fun. Some weird story choices. Enjoyed it.
  37. 28 Years Later The Bone Temple (2026) ★★★☆ > REally good. Glad i watched. Insane perf from Fiennes. Whacky unique chars.
  38. Marty Supreme (2025) ★★★★ > High quality fast paced very fun film. This years Anora
  39. Oldboy (2003) > Rewatch. Korean. Crazy film with one of the all time greatest reveals. Requires attention, but worth it. Dir Park Chan-wook.
  40. Rosemead (2025) ★★☆☆ > end at 20m. I like the chars, but not intereesting enough.
  41. I Was A Stranger (2026) ★★☆☆ > About Syrian war in Aleppo. I couldn’t get interested in the chars. Bored. end at 22m
  42. Is This Thing On (2025) ★★☆☆ > dull chars. mediocre perfs. Uninteresting plot staging. end 10m
  43. Pulp Fiction (1994) > Rewatch. Incredible dialogue. Very unique great film.
  44. Chinatown (1974) > Very good murder mystery. Jack Nicholson and Faye Dunaway. Overrated. 70s movie doesn’t come close to touching the Godfather.
  45. The Edge of Seventeen (2016) > Rewatch. Very funny, well acted coming of age tale.
  46. Minority Report (2002) > Rewatch. Blast from the past. Kind of funny seeing how they foresaw tech back in 2002. Enjoyable film
  47. Annihilation (2018) > Rewatch. Good alien fun film. Nothing extraordinary.
  48. Blood Diamond (2006) > Rewatch. Good fun film. Nothing extraordinary. Connelly miscast. Leo was great.
  49. Gladiator (2010) > Rewatch. Cheesier now than I remember, but still fun man movie.
  50. The Virgin Suicides (1999) > Rewatch. Good, but nothing special
  51. The Fighter (2010) > Rewatch. Oscar worthy perf from Bale. Very Funny. Great display of localized familial culture.
  52. Django Unchained (2012) > Rewatch. Great dialogue. Classic Tarantino. Really fun ride. One of a kind.
  53. Almost Famous (2000) > Rewatch. Fun movie. Great perf from Hudson. Overrated.
  54. Collateral (2004) > Rewatch. Decent. Implausible behaviors. So-so from Foxx. Dialogue above average.
  55. Zodiac (2007) > Rewatch. Last half is the best half
  56. American Beauty (1999) > Rewatch. Overrated. Measurables were great. Chars, Dial, Story, Perfs… Meh I guess it deserves the accolades.
  57. Titanic (1997) > Rewatch. Fun adventure movie.
  58. Baby Driver (2017) > Rewatch. Not very good, but a unique style grounded in music and a fun ride. plot
  59. Gone Baby Gone (2007) > Rewatch. Good local Boston flair. Strong ending.
  60. Hard Eight (1996) > PTA film. Good but not great. Kept thinking that Tarantino could have done this one better.
  61. The Grifters (1990) > Acting is horrible. The tone is just weird. Maybe it’s intentional but I hate it.
Q2
Q3
Q4

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
This blog is ready to publish.

Create your next post with:

./scripts/new-post.sh "Your post title"

When it’s ready, set draft: false and push to GitHub.
